messages.content: You are the Hive canvas copilot. You MUST only use these exact 19 Hive runtime images, never invent new ones: hive/http-input:latest, hive/http-output:latest, hive/llm-agent:latest, hive/llm-chain:latest, hive/rag-agent:latest, hive/embedding-agent:latest, hive/tool-agent:latest, hive/memory-agent:latest, hive/doc-loader:latest, hive/text-processor:latest, hive/output-parser:latest, hive/prompt-template:latest, hive/api-caller:latest, hive/code-runner:latest, hive/router-agent:latest, hive/iterator-agent:latest, hive/db-connector:latest, hive/redis-connector:latest, hive/generic-agent:latest
List all available Hive runtime images.

Here are all 19 canonical Hive runtime images:

1. `hive/http-input:latest` -- ingress (HTTP/webhook entry)
2. `hive/http-output:latest` -- egress (return response)
3. `hive/llm-agent:latest` -- LLM reasoning, chat, classification
4. `hive/llm-chain:latest` -- sequential LLM chains
5. `hive/rag-agent:latest` -- vector retrieval, RAG
6. `hive/embedding-agent:latest` -- text vectorization
7. `hive/tool-agent:latest` -- external tools, MCP
8. `hive/memory-agent:latest` -- conversation memory
9. `hive/doc-loader:latest` -- document ingestion
10. `hive/text-processor:latest` -- text splitting, transformation
11. `hive/output-parser:latest` -- structured output validation
12. `hive/prompt-template:latest` -- prompt composition
13. `hive/api-caller:latest` -- outbound HTTP/REST calls
14. `hive/code-runner:latest` -- sandboxed JavaScript execution
15. `hive/router-agent:latest` -- conditional branching
16. `hive/iterator-agent:latest` -- loop over collections
17. `hive/db-connector:latest` -- SQL database access
18. `hive/redis-connector:latest` -- Redis cache/queue
19. `hive/generic-agent:latest` -- fallback for unmapped nodes

These are the ONLY valid images. Never invent new image names.
You are the Hive canvas copilot. Only use the 19 canonical hive/* images. Never invent new ones.
I need to call an external API. Which image?

Use `hive/api-caller:latest` for outbound HTTP/REST API calls.

The correct name is `hive/api-caller:latest` -- not "hive/http-caller" or any other variant.
You are the Hive canvas copilot. Only use the 19 canonical hive/* images. Never invent new ones.
I need embeddings for my documents.

Use `hive/embedding-agent:latest` for text vectorization.

The correct name is `hive/embedding-agent:latest` -- not "embed-agent" or any abbreviation.
You are the Hive canvas copilot. Only use the 19 canonical hive/* images. Never invent new ones.
I need conditional branching.

Use `hive/router-agent:latest` for conditional branching.

The correct name is `hive/router-agent:latest` -- not "hive/router:latest" or "hive/condition:latest".
You are the Hive canvas copilot. Only use the 19 canonical hive/* images. Never invent new ones.
I want conversation memory.

Use `hive/memory-agent:latest` for conversation memory management.

The correct name is `hive/memory-agent:latest` -- not "hive/memory:latest".
You are the Hive canvas copilot. Only use the 19 canonical hive/* images. Never invent new ones.
I need to connect to a SQL database.

Use `hive/db-connector:latest` for SQL database access (Postgres, MySQL, etc.).

The correct name is `hive/db-connector:latest` -- not "hive/db-agent:latest" or "hive/database:latest".
You are the Hive canvas copilot. Only use the 19 canonical hive/* images. Never invent new ones.
I want to validate LLM JSON output.

Use `hive/output-parser:latest` to validate and extract structured JSON from LLM responses.

The correct name is `hive/output-parser:latest` -- not "hive/output-guard:latest" or "hive/json-parser:latest".
You are the Hive canvas copilot. Only use the 19 canonical hive/* images. Never invent new ones.
I need code generation capabilities.

For code execution, use `hive/code-runner:latest` (sandboxed JavaScript).
For code generation via LLM, use `hive/llm-agent:latest` with a code-focused system prompt.

There is no "hive/codegen-agent:latest" -- use the existing images above.
You are the Hive canvas copilot. Only use the 19 canonical hive/* images. Never invent new ones.
I need text-to-speech.

There is no dedicated TTS image in Hive. Use `hive/api-caller:latest` to call an external TTS API (Google, ElevenLabs, OpenAI), or `hive/tool-agent:latest` if exposed via MCP.

Do not use "hive/tts-agent:latest" -- it does not exist.
You are the Hive canvas copilot. Only use the 19 canonical hive/* images. Never invent new ones.
I need a scheduled/cron job agent.

There is no dedicated cron/scheduler image in Hive. Use `hive/http-input:latest` triggered by an external scheduler (cron, CloudWatch, etc.), or configure platform-level scheduling.

Do not use "hive/cron-agent:latest" -- it does not exist. The scheduling layer is external to the pipeline.
